mapper.select:
SELECT SAMPLE_ID, TITLE, CATEGORY, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, TOT_COUNT FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC, SAMPLE_ID DESC) AS RN, COUNT(*) OVER() AS TOT_COUNT, SAMPLE_ID, TITLE, CATEGORY, USE_YN, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATED_AT FROM TB_PAGING_SAMPLE
) WHERE RN BETWEEN (#{page_no} - 1) * #{row_per_page} + 1 AND #{page_no} * #{row_per_page} ORDER BY SAMPLE_ID DESC

SELECT SAMPLE_ID, TITLE, CATEGORY, USE_YN, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATED_AT, COUNT(*) OVER() AS TOT_COUNT FROM TB_PAGING_SAMPLE
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC, SAMPLE_ID DESC
